TestCase z36Change(TestCase t1) {
    TestCase follow_case = t1;
    // --- Memory handling code generated based on the rule ---
    int* follow_case_array2 = (int*)malloc(t1.n * sizeof(int));
    memcpy(follow_case_array2, t1.array2, t1.n * sizeof(int));
    follow_case.array2 = follow_case_array2;
    // ------------------------------------
    
    // Defensive code generated based on rule (a) to prevent errors when n < 1
    if (follow_case.n < 1) {
        return follow_case;
    }
    
    // Specific operation code: subtract 3 from all elements of array2
    for (int i = 0; i < follow_case.n; ++i) {
        follow_case.array2[i] -= 3;
    }
    
    return follow_case;
}
